posts.text:
VoiceInk has thoroughly impressed me for macOS transcription. GPL, no sub. There is a Pro tier, or build from source free (a transparent business model <3 ) It does realtime transcription, drop-in voice notes, and a solid spread of models.

now when I am going "what the shit?!" at some dumb technical mess my macbook can actually hear it

anyone else having this issue with the Threads web client sidebar flyout thing being blank? It seems like its getting stuck between collapsed and expanded. I have been seeing this for awhile now. I think it relates to the window size - it seems to happen when I have a window width of around ~1045px

Zen 1.20.2b (Firefox 151.0.3) (aarch64)
